description: Commercial Lease / Real Estate Agreement - covers office, retail, industrial, and warehouse property leases

lease_metadata.description: Basic lease identification, parties, and property information

lease_title.description: Official title of the lease agreement

effective_date.description: Date the lease agreement is executed or becomes effective

landlord_name.description: Full legal name of the landlord or property owner

tenant_name.description: Full legal name of the tenant or lessee

property_address.description: Full street address of the leased property or premises

property_type.description: Type or classification of the leased property

total_square_footage.description: Total rentable or usable square footage of the leased premises

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the lease

term_and_rent.description: Lease term duration and rent structure including escalations

commencement_date.description: Date the lease term begins and tenant may occupy the premises

lease_term_months.description: Total length of the initial lease term in months

rent_currency.description: Currency in which rent is denominated

rent_escalation.description: Rent escalation or increase mechanism over the lease term

type.description: Method by which rent is escalated

rate.description: Escalation rate or percentage per period

rent_free_period_months.description: Number of months of rent abatement or free rent at the start of the lease

security_deposit.description: Security deposit amount required from the tenant

security_deposit_return_conditions.description: Conditions and timeline for return of the security deposit

first_month_due_date.description: Date by which the first month's rent payment is due

additional_costs.description: Operating expenses, taxes, insurance, and other costs beyond base rent

cam_charges.description: Common Area Maintenance charges and how they are calculated or allocated

property_taxes_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for property taxes and how they are allocated

insurance_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for various insurance coverages on the property

utilities_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for utility costs and how they are metered or allocated

janitorial_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for janitorial and cleaning services

repairs_and_maintenance.description: Allocation of repair and maintenance responsibilities between landlord and tenant

landlord_responsibility.description: Repairs and maintenance items that are the landlord's responsibility

tenant_responsibility.description: Repairs and maintenance items that are the tenant's responsibility

capital_improvements_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for capital improvements and major renovations

operating_expense_cap_percent.description: Maximum annual percentage increase cap on operating expenses charged to tenant
extraction_hints: shall not increase by more than

use_and_restrictions.description: Permitted uses, exclusivity rights, and restrictions on the leased premises

permitted_use.description: Permitted use or purpose for the leased premises

exclusive_use_rights.description: Exclusive use rights granted to the tenant within the property or development

prohibited_uses.description: Uses that are expressly prohibited on the leased premises

signage_rights.description: Tenant's rights to install signage on or near the premises

parking_spaces_allocated.description: Number of parking spaces allocated to the tenant and any associated costs

storage_space_included.description: Whether additional storage space is included and its location or size

hours_of_operation.description: Building hours of operation and after-hours access policies

noise_restrictions.description: Restrictions on noise levels or noisy activities on the premises

hazardous_materials_prohibited.description: Restrictions on hazardous, toxic, or dangerous materials on the premises

alterations_and_improvements.description: Tenant improvement allowances, alteration rights, and restoration obligations

tenant_improvement_allowance.description: Dollar amount or per-square-foot allowance provided by landlord for tenant build-out

approval_required_for_alterations.description: Whether landlord approval is required for tenant alterations and the approval process

restoration_required_on_exit.description: Whether the tenant must restore the premises to original condition upon lease expiration

ownership_of_improvements.description: Who owns tenant improvements and fixtures upon installation or lease expiration

construction_standards.description: Required construction standards, permits, and compliance requirements for alterations

renewal_and_options.description: Renewal rights, expansion/contraction options, and assignment/sublease provisions

renewal_option_exists.description: Whether the tenant has an option to renew the lease

renewal_notice_period_days.description: Number of days before expiration that tenant must provide renewal notice

renewal_term_months.description: Duration of each renewal term in months

renewal_rent_terms.description: How rent is determined during the renewal period

right_of_first_refusal.description: Tenant's right of first refusal for additional or adjacent space

expansion_option.description: Tenant's option to expand into additional space within the property

contraction_option.description: Tenant's option to reduce the size of the leased premises

purchase_option.description: Tenant's option to purchase the leased property

sublease_allowed.description: Whether the tenant is permitted to sublease all or part of the premises

assignment_allowed.description: Whether the tenant is permitted to assign the lease to another party

landlord_consent_required.description: Whether landlord consent is required for sublease or assignment and the standard applied

insurance_and_liability.description: Insurance requirements, indemnification, and liability provisions

tenant_insurance_required.description: Types and minimum amounts of insurance the tenant must maintain

general_liability.description: Required commercial general liability insurance coverage minimum

property_insurance.description: Required property or contents insurance coverage minimum

umbrella_liability.description: Required umbrella or excess liability insurance coverage

landlord_insurance.description: Insurance coverages maintained by the landlord on the building or property

indemnification.description: Indemnification obligations between landlord and tenant

waiver_of_subrogation.description: Whether the parties waive subrogation rights against each other

environmental_liability.description: Allocation of liability for environmental contamination or remediation

ADA_compliance_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for Americans with Disabilities Act compliance

default_and_remedies.description: Default events, cure periods, remedies, and force majeure provisions

tenant_default_events.description: Events that constitute a default by the tenant

cure_period_days.description: Number of days the defaulting party has to cure a default before remedies apply

landlord_remedies.description: Remedies available to the landlord upon tenant default

eviction.description: Landlord's right to terminate the lease and evict the tenant

acceleration.description: Landlord's right to accelerate remaining rent obligations

damages.description: Landlord's right to recover damages from the tenant

landlord_default_events.description: Events that constitute a default by the landlord

tenant_remedies.description: Remedies available to the tenant upon landlord default

force_majeure.description: Force majeure clause covering events beyond the control of either party

holdover_rent_percentage.description: Percentage of base rent charged if tenant holds over beyond the lease term
